name: Alex Mercer
summary: Senior Software Development Engineer with 11+ years building cloud-native platforms, developer tooling, and AI-assisted workflows. Strong record leading migrations from monoliths to event-driven systems, improving release reliability, and mentoring engineers across product and platform teams. Comfortable moving between architecture, hands-on implementation, incident response, and cross-functional delivery.
workExperience:
Senior Software Development Engineer, HelioStack | London, UK | Mar 2022 - Present

  • Led the migration of a multi-tenant document workflow platform from Kubernetes-hosted Node services to edge-first services on Cloudflare Workers, cutting median API latency by 38% and infrastructure spend by 24%.
  • Designed an AI-assisted job application workflow using structured resume analysis, streaming review responses, and browser-based export automation for PDF and DOCX output.
  • Introduced contract testing, canary release gates, and service scorecards that reduced production regressions by 42% over four quarters.
  • Mentored 6 engineers on system design, incident review, and performance tuning while acting as technical lead for two cross-team platform initiatives.

Staff Software Engineer, Northstar Commerce | Remote | Jan 2019 - Feb 2022

  • Rebuilt checkout orchestration and order event pipelines with TypeScript, Kafka, and Postgres, supporting 4x transaction growth without major availability incidents.
  • Created internal developer platform tooling for preview environments, rollout controls, and observability dashboards, decreasing mean time to recovery from 54 minutes to 18 minutes.
  • Partnered with security and compliance teams to implement audit logging, secrets rotation, and policy enforcement across CI/CD systems.

Software Engineer, Gridline Labs | San Francisco, CA | Jul 2014 - Dec 2018

  • Built customer-facing analytics and workflow APIs in Node.js and Python for logistics clients processing millions of shipment events per day.
  • Improved query performance with caching, indexing, and asynchronous job scheduling, reducing dashboard load times from 11 seconds to under 2 seconds.
  • Contributed to frontend architecture in React, including reusable component patterns for reporting, search, and admin tooling.
volunteerExperience:
Volunteer Mentor, CodeBridge | 2021 - Present

  • Coach early-career developers on interview preparation, portfolio reviews, and backend engineering fundamentals.
  • Run monthly mock system design sessions focused on APIs, scaling, and debugging discipline.

education.additionalInfo: Graduated with First Class Honours. Final-year dissertation focused on distributed systems fault tolerance and event consistency models.

projects:
Edge Resume Copilot

  • Built a prototype assistant for resume tailoring and application prep using Workers AI, structured JSON review output, and resumable chat state.
  • Added patch-based editing suggestions so users could apply AI recommendations directly to editable CV fields.

Deploy Radar

  • Created an internal release health dashboard aggregating deploy metadata, test coverage, and error budgets across 40+ services.
  • Used event streaming and lightweight anomaly detection to surface risky releases before customer impact.
awards:
Engineering Impact Award | HelioStack | 2024

Recognized for leading the platform modernization program and improving service reliability during a critical product expansion.
additionalInfo: Eligible to work in the UK and US. Open to staff-level backend, platform, and AI application engineering roles. Regularly write architecture notes and interview loops for engineering hiring panels.
interests: Distributed systems, developer experience, applied AI products, distance running
